title: Cherry Bee
description: A pink Bee texture, for bees in the new Cherry Grove biome!
body:
# Cherry Bee
I made pink Bee textures! By downloading this resource pack and either  [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads), you'll be able to see these textures when a Bee spawns in the new Cherry Grove biome. You can also name a Bee one of the following to give it this special texture:
* `cherry`
* `Cherry`
* `cherry bee`
* `Cherry Bee`
* `pink`
* `Pink`
* `sakura`
* `Sakura`

If using one of the versions of the pack marked "etf" (for Entity Texture Features), then you can also add a Bee to a team with one of those names to give it the pink texture.
